content: Thomas has the Bible in nine languages: Spanish, Esperanto, French, Greek, Hungarian, English, Latin, Portuguese and Russian.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Tommaso ha la Bibbia in nove lingue﹕ spagnolo, esperanto, francese, greco, ungherese, inglese, latino, portoghese e russ
